div.head: GT–43. Telegram from the Secretary of State to the Embassy in GuatemalaSource: Department of State, Central Files, 814.10/11–1860. Confidential; Priority. Drafted by Carwell and signed by Higdon.
div.p:
350. Ten million dollars approved by Under Secretary Dillon for imports from the U.S. with counterpart being granted to the GOG as accrued. Detailed information to follow. You may wish convey info President Ydígoras.Muccio informed Ydígoras and Unda Murillo on November 19. (Telegram 260 from Guatemala City, November 23, 1960; 814.10/11–2360) Public announcement left to your and President’s
discretion. If public announcement contemplated, please give department 24 hours advance notice to permit consideration simultaneous release Washington.Ydígoras and Muccio agreed on an announcement to be issued to the press on December 10. It referred to agreement on a $9.6 million loan for the Rio Hondo road and the El Molino highway, and approved of a $10 million grant to assist the Guatemalan Government. (Telegram 284 from Guatemala City, December 8, 1960; 714.5–MSP/12–860) No record of a simultaneous release in Washington was found.
